name: Stalking Samantha: 13 Years of Terror
overview: Chained in a soundproof box by the man who stalked her for over a decade, Samantha must rely on her mind to survive. As she escapes, she faces a brutal choice: put Christopher behind bars on lesser charges or risk everything in pursuit of justice.

trailers.title: Stalking Samantha: 13 Years of Terror | Official Trailer
